name: golang-github-valyala-fasttemplate-dev
title: golang-github-valyala-fasttemplate-dev
summary: simple and fast template engine for Go
description:
simple and fast template engine for Go
Fasttemplate peforms only a single task - it substitutes template
placeholders with user-defined values.
